beer.beer_description:
Our NZ Red IPA is a hoppy, bitter beer with a reddish-amber colour that combines the citrusy, piney character of an American IPA with a noticeable caramel malt backbone.

Utilising New Zealand hop Riwaka, we believe our IPA has the perfect balance of bitter sweetness.

items.badge_description:
Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 5 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 2!

items.badge_description: We believe in IPA and you should too. You certainly have a taste for the hops! That's 45 different IPAs. Try 5 more for Level 10! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink you check in helps power your faction as we race toward choosing the next Untappd icon. Explore your year in beer at Recappd and come back tomorrow!
Thanks for enjoying a brew at Page Bottler! Keep checking in here to level up all the way to 100. Cheers!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 35 distinct venues!
